curation_notes: Patch modifies a single file (lz4.go), replacing the deprecated LZ4_uncompress C API call with LZ4_decompress_safe in the Uncompress function. The deprecated API does not perform bounds checking on the output buffer, enabling out-of-bounds writes. Sibling file lz4_hc.go only contains compression functions and does not use LZ4_uncompress, so no sibling locations were added. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow (from CWE-787) is correct.
